title: kube: add DaemonSet support
body:
Closes #18899

```release-note
kube: adds support for `DaemonSet`
```

Signed-off-by: danishprakash <danish.prakash@suse.com>

comments.body: This looks like it is only for `kube play`, can we add support to generate Daemonset yamls in `kube generate` as well? We should try and keep support for k8s Kinds the same on both the generate and play parts.

LGTM
@umohnani8 while I agree that adding this support can be beneficial, I don't think we should block this PR for it. I think we should merge and open a ticket for generate

That sounds OK as well.  Only adding it to `generate` would be a blocker since we always want to be able to `play` what we `generate`.
@umohnani8 @rhatdan WDYT?
Agree we need to be able to `play` what we `generate`.
I've been looking into `generate`, and should have a PR up and running in a day or two.

I am fine with merging this while we wait for the generate PR
LGTM
